task_completion.description: Verify that the settings screenshot shows the Sygic GPS Navigation app settings menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the settings_confirmation.png screenshot and confirm it displays the settings interface of the Sygic app.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2D North-Up map view option is selected in the settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the settings_confirmation.png screenshot for an active or selected option indicating '2D', 'North-Up', or '2D mode with north up'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final map view screenshot shows the Sygic GPS Navigation map interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the final_map_view.png screenshot and confirm it displays the map navigation interface of the Sygic app.

task_completion.description: Verify that the map is displayed in a 2D top-down perspective.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the final_map_view.png screenshot to confirm the map is viewed from directly above (top-down), without a tilted horizon or 3D perspective.

task_completion.description: Verify that the map is oriented North-Up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the final_map_view.png screenshot to confirm the map is oriented with North at the top, typically indicated by a compass icon pointing straight up.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots display the genuine app interface and not a web browser, image gallery, or search results showing pictures of the app.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a terminal to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots do not show a terminal, command prompt, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots appear to be genuine captures of the device screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check for any signs of manual image editing, cropping, or fabrication in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sygic GPS Navigation supports a '2D mode with north up' display mode. In 2D mode, the map has a top-down view (0 degrees tilt). North-Up orientation means the map is oriented with North at the top, often indicated by a compass icon pointing straight up. The settings screenshot is expected at /sdcard/tasks/set_map_2d_north_up/settings_confirmation.png and the map screenshot at /sdcard/tasks/set_map_2d_north_up/final_map_view.png.
